title: Roborock's New LiDAR Robot Lawn Mower Is Already $700 Off
summary: Roborock threw its hat into the wireless robot lawn mower game this month with the AI-powered Roborock X120H robot lawn mower . Like most robot mowers, it can be controlled through the Roborock app.
